finding: Document lacks direct evidence of a documented, continuous risk management process covering the full lifecycle.
legal_basis: Article 9 requires a risk management system to be established, implemented, documented and maintained in relation to high-risk AI systems.
llm_recommendation: Develop and document a comprehensive risk management plan that covers the full lifecycle of the AI system, including risk identification, estimation, evaluation, and communication of residual risks.
confidence_reason: The finding is based on the absence of evidence, which inherently carries uncertainty.
